## What & why

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes (extend the precedence matrix if precedence logic changed)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]`
